title: Nova Iguaçu、RJ — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Nova Iguaçu、RJの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Nova IguaçuはRJにある人口825,388の都市です。A large suburb of Rio de Janeiro in the Baixada Fluminense region, known for its commerce and the Tinguá biological reserve.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
